focus: Do other skills' own SKILL.md, references, and assets mention mk-goal.js, /goal, or mk_goal, and are those mentions still accurate post-remediation?
noveltyJustification: Exact skill and README sweeps confirmed other skill SKILL.md files are mostly clear, added a new root README bare-/goal invocation gap, revalidated the stale system-skill-advisor README live-tool claim, separated plugin README incompleteness from contradiction, and classified usage_limited dead claims as archive-only drift.
